productName: House of Cultivar Grand Cru Hash Rosin Sugar Berry Scone - 1g
description: Top-shelf hybrid hash rosin, made by ice-water washing Sugar Berry Scone into bubble hash, then pressing that hash into pure, terpene-drenched oil — two crafts in one jar. The cleanest expression of the strain — with notes of butter, berry, and strawberry, with a balanced head-and-body experience.
